features.name: implication with if inside constraint_set consequent
features.description: Code should include an implication constraint where the consequent is a constraint_set block containing an if statement with a conditional expression

features.name: basic implication in constraint
features.description: Code should include a basic implication operator (->) used in a constraint expression with an expression consequent

features.name: if statement inside constraint_set block
features.description: Code should include an if statement with a conditional expression inside a constraint_set block using curly braces
